use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING A BACTERIAL INFECTION BY ADMINISTERING A RECONSTITUTED SOLID FORMULATION OF DAPTOMYCIN CONTAINING 31.0 TO 59.4% WT TOTAL MANNITOL AND SORBITOL
